race.comment: FIERCE DREAMS (10) was spelled off a decent effort on debut and resumed here with a nose defeat, finishing the race off strongly. Draws inside and she can go one better with the extra fitness. PAFITIS (5) peaks for the premier stable and with the blinkers on for the first time looks poised to show his best. Has the switch to John Allen and draws for a soft on-pace run. ARWYN (1) raced forward and was only beaten 2.2L at Sale. Will have taken further fitness and learning. HOLIDAY SURCHARGE (11) debuts and Yendall is a positive jockey booking. Brings a win and second placing from the Geelong jumpouts and despite the awkward gate deserves a betting watch. Ditto ROMUALD (16), who resumes for the Smith yard. May need one but is capable of improvement this preparation.
